notes: No reliable information available in training data for watch brand '420 Waldos'. Unable to verify existence or details.

Aeroluft specializes in aviation pilot watches and racing driver watches themed around WWI ace pilots and historic racetracks. All watches feature 316L stainless steel cases, Japanese quartz movements, mineral dome lens, and leather or rubber straps. Brand positions itself as offering high-quality affordable pilot watches with historical storytelling.

European watch brand focused on aviation-inspired timepieces. Collections include pilot watches with various complications such as chronographs, GMT functions, and slide rule features. Known for blending vintage design aesthetics with modern functionality.
Modern luxury microbrand specializing in natural stone dials. Uses Miyota Japan 9-series automatic movements. Offers 12-month global warranty with service centers in Canada, Romania, and Japan.

Microbrand dive watch company specializing in vintage-inspired designs inspired by Japanese ama diving heritage. Flagship model AMA Diver features 300m water resistance, sapphire crystal, and Miyota 9039 automatic movement.

Alcon Watches offers affordable stainless steel timepieces across multiple collections including Milanese, Timeless, Daytona, and Vintage. Current product range features case sizes from 40mm to 47mm with mesh bands and sapphire-coated lenses. Operates with same-day shipping and accepts multiple currencies.
Ancon is an unknown watch brand with insufficient reliable information in training data. No confirmed website, location, or active business presence could be verified.

Professional mechanical watch maker with multiple models including The Disc One, The Cerberus, The Cylindrex, The Revolution H, and The Orbitron. Offers worldwide free shipping. Country of origin unknown from available content.
Unable to extract data. Homepage shows redirect message with no accessible content. Brand information could not be verified.

Aquinus specializes in diving watches with a focus on ocean conservation partnerships. The brand works with diving ambassadors and communities dedicated to marine life preservation. Known for models including Hydrautica, Marellio, and Ruggada collections.

Atomi Shine is a watch brand featuring lab-grown diamonds and exquisite craftsmanship. Offers both men's and women's collections with multiple series including Hydrocore, Eondate, Velocirex, and others. Uses automatic and quartz movements.
Bali Ha'i is not a recognized watch brand in available training data. No confirmed information about founding, location, or current operations.

No data found for 'Boscarelli Watch & Co'. The provided content is from Boscov's department store (boscovs.com), which is unrelated to the requested watch brand. No independent watch brand by this name could be verified.

Boschett manufactures watches emphasizing quality and affordability as core principles. Watches are produced in facilities in Switzerland and China. All timepieces come with a 12-year warranty and feature durable, water-resistant cases.

Bremoir is an Art Deco-inspired watch brand offering limited edition wristwatches. The brand features three main collections: The Eastern, The Lexington, and The South Beach, with prices ranging from approximately £746-£1,322. All watches come with a two-year warranty and 7-day money-back guarantee.

No valid data could be extracted. The provided homepage content is a Walmart verification page, not the official Bymax watch brand website. Unable to confirm brand existence, location, or specifications.

Aviation-inspired microbrand offering pilot watches with Miyota and Seiko automatic movements. Features tribute models honoring Top Gun pilots Maverick and Iceman. Specializes in titanium and stainless steel sports watches with GMT functionality and rotating bezels.

Microbrand watch company designed in the USA. Produces limited edition dive and field watches with Swiss automatic movements and custom-built components. Known for enthusiast-focused designs combining pilot and dive watch aesthetics.
No reliable information available in training data for watch brand 'Carabao'. Unable to confirm existence, origin country, or current status.

Carl JHones is a watch brand emphasizing Swiss craftsmanship and timeless design. The brand offers multiple collections including Altisimo, Echo, Lunae, Plume, Respire, Torque, and Viatori, with both men's and women's watches available.

Castle & Gazelle Watch Company operates an e-commerce site with international shipping to 190+ countries. Current promotion active (Eid2026 discount code). No specific product details, pricing, location, or founding information available in provided content.

Charles Delon is a watch brand sold through secondary markets like Poshmark. Products include quartz watches for women and men in casual and formal styles with various metal finishes. Brand origin country and founding details are not verifiable from available data.

Third-generation watchmaking family crafting instrument-inspired wristwatches since 2005. Specializes in pilot watches, aviation timepieces, and contemporary minimal designs. Known for heritage-inspired collections with accessible pricing.

Chronologia is an active watch brand specializing in outdoor sports watches with collections including Canyoneer, Chaser, Pilot, Climber, and Trekker models. Watches feature Japan-made Seiko NH35 and Swiss-made Quartz movements, designed for active lifestyles with materials like composite construction and Trigalight technology.

South African watch brand based in Cape Town offering men's and women's watches with customization options. Known for affordable luxury watches with multiple strap configurations and complementary accessories including smartwatch upgrades and jewelry. Operates fully in Cape Town with worldwide delivery.
No reliable information available in training data for watch brand Coop+Gray. Cannot confirm founding details, location, or current status.

Professional diving watch brand specializing in extreme depth technical watches. All models feature mechanical automatic movements (Sellita SW200-1) and are produced as limited editions with individual serial numbers. Designs inspired by historic diving watch milestones.

Decima Watches is a luxury and affordable automatic microbrand offering men's watches. Current collections include the Gatekeeper lineup (priced $499-$599) and Scylla collection (priced $899). The brand operates internationally with USD pricing.

Value-driven sports watch company specializing in automatic diver watches. The Hydra features 2,000 meters water resistance, vintage design aesthetic with state-of-the-art materials, and Seiko-made movement. Limited UK Edition available with Union Jack flag design.
No information about Diakka brand found in provided ShopSimon website content. Brand does not appear in the listed brands or designers on the platform.

Microbrand that integrates timeless vintage design with modern materials. First model (Marlin) successfully funded on Kickstarter in 2019. Current collection includes Marlin, Barracuda, Narwhal, and Dorado GMT models.
Watch brand selling automatic and dress watch models under the 'Apex' and 'Aquamaster' collections. Currently offering discounted prices with free worldwide shipping. Country of origin unknown.

No watch brand named 'Douglas' found in provided content. Content shows David Douglas Diamonds & Jewelry (a jewelry retailer in Marietta, GA) selling watches from other brands including Shinola and Citizen, but no independent 'Douglas' watch brand.

notes: Earth Wood produces sustainably-sourced wood watches, sunglasses, and accessories using materials like rosewood, zebrawood, and cork. The brand is eco-friendly and biodegradable, committed to reducing environmental harm from fashion production. Currently operating with 58 watch models and global shipping.

EMG Watches produces retro-styled chronographs in square cases with ST19 hand-wind movements. Current collection includes Nemo Diver, DL63 Chronograph, and Horizon V2 available in multiple dial colors.

Ergon Watches is a project by two friends founded around 2014, focused on high-quality manufactured watches at accessible prices. The brand currently offers the Adventum collection (water resistant to 100m, 316L steel, 10.5mm thickness) and the Maelstrom model line. The name 'Ergon' refers to a unit of work or energy, reflecting the brand's philosophy on timekeeping.

Eylandt is a microbrand collection by Hemel, LLC, featuring sturdy purpose-built watches with sapphire crystals and 200m water resistance. Known for no-nonsense aesthetics and competitive specs at accessible pricing. Founder Marvin Menke is active in the League of Microbrands community on Facebook.
Chinese independent watch brand.

FullGear produces custom and personalised tritium watches. Known for the Orca diver watch line available in multiple color variants (Coal, Navy, Salmon, Aqua) with 40mm case size and tritium (GTLS) indices. Also offers MK II Automatic, Claymore Chronograph models and watch straps.

Young watch brand born from watch enthusiasts in online forums. Has completed ten successful campaigns with watches sold in over 55 countries. Offers custom-engraved special edition timepieces with leather strap options.

Gemstar is a watch brand sold through Nidalco, a Jordanian retailer. The brand offers affordable automatic and quartz men's watches with multiple color variants, priced between 11.99-23.00 JOD (approximately $17-32 USD).

Story-driven microbrand creating limited edition timepieces with narrative themes inspired by abandoned places and forgotten legends. Each watch features original industrial design with Swiss Ronda movements and includes blockchain-registered NFT Certificate of Authenticity. Currently selling 500-unit limited edition 'Old West' collection.

Halcyon Watch specializes in porcelain watch cases, featuring collections including Journey, Poise, Open, Origin, and Blue. The brand emphasizes exceptional value with worry-free shipping and a 2+1-year warranty.

Heritor Automatic specializes in automatic mechanical watches with jeweled movements in surgical-grade stainless steel cases. Collections feature diverse model names and offer both leather and bracelet band options. Brand emphasizes heritage and legacy as core values in watch craftsmanship.

Hruodland is a watch brand offering homage designs including Blancpain Fifty Fathoms and Zenith Aviator inspired models. Watches feature bronze cases (CuSn8 bronze), various movements (NH34, NH35, ETA2824, SW200, PT5000), and styles ranging from dive watches to pilot chronographs and dress watches.

British-based microbrand specializing in vintage-inspired diver watches. Known for the Aquatique collection featuring 37.4mm cases with domed sapphire bezels and mechanical movements. Currently selling Aquatique and Aquatique GMT models in multiple dial colors.

Humism is an artistic watch studio creating automatic watches with kinetic design elements. The brand views watches as canvases for art and donates 2% of web-store sales to charity. Products are worn in over 60 countries and have been featured in Yahoo, Gear Patrol, and The Week.

Makara Watches operates a functional e-commerce site with worldwide shipping on orders $150 and up. The brand offers watch straps and buckles, including lizard leather options. Country of origin cannot be determined from available content.

Watch brand with active e-commerce presence. Specializes in Skin-Diver models and Odyssey collections priced from $1,050 to $1,750. Also offers apparel and accessories including NATO straps and bracelets.

MoVas is an independent watch brand known for diving watches and heritage military-inspired timepieces. The brand features distinctive models including the Oceaner series with internal rotating bezels, Diver collections, and heritage chronographs. Country of origin remains unconfirmed from available homepage content.

Nethuns is a watch brand founded by watch enthusiasts with a mission to create robust professional diver watches. The brand uses unique metals and materials with quality movements, designing durable timepieces intended to last a lifetime. The website contains multiple PHP errors and appears to have technical issues, with no clear pricing or product information accessible.

Nibosi is a watch brand specializing in men's and women's quartz and mechanical watches with stainless steel cases. The brand offers diverse collections including sport, luxury, chronograph, and car-themed watches. Currently operating with 124 products in inventory and active e-commerce operations across multiple currencies.

Nine Four Watches is a watch brand selling modern automatic and chronograph timepieces. Current collections include Successor 2 automatic watches and Culture Chronograph 2 models in various color variants. Prices are listed in GBP.

Nintai Watches is a microbrand focused on everyday endurance watches with in-house regulation, testing, and inspection. All watches include inspection cards and feature modern design with functionality. Brand operates on scheduled production windows and offers 14-day returns with 1-year warranty.

Nobel Timepieces offers stainless steel and two-tone watches with Swiss movements and sapphire crystals. Product range includes men's, women's, and sports collections with prices from $110-$375 USD. Features Bluetooth chronographs and leather bracelet variants.

Nordic-inspired watch brand offering sports watches with moon phase complications. Current collections include LUNØR, SØVÆRN, and ØSTERSØEN models. Offers 30-day returns, DHL express shipping, and 24-month warranty on manufacturing defects.

Brand rebranded from NUUN OFFICIAL to NUNCIER. Known for lightweight carbon composite watches with anti-shock design and collaborations (Peanuts, Al Ittihad). Offers multiple collections including Origen, Origen Carbon, Origen Steel, and Origen Pro models.

O&HoraPictor is the result of a merger between Orodol and HoraPictor brands. The brand specializes in luxury enamel artistry watches, with collections including sport-inspired models like Cyclist's Blaze and Grand Slam watches.

Quasar is a contemporary watch brand offering automatic watches with cosmic-themed designs. Currently conducting Kickstarter pre-orders for 2026 models including the ABYSS and Starlight V2 collections. All prices displayed as £0.00 pending pre-order confirmation.

Radia Watches is an independent watch brand featuring the Trinity collection with distinctive dial designs in yellow and black variants. All Trinity models are priced at $479 USD with interchangeable leather and military straps. Currently all Trinity collection watches show as sold out but brand remains active with newsletter signup and payment infrastructure in place.

Rdunae watches founded in 2019 by designer Feng. Brand name derives from Latin 'Roma die uno non aedificata est' (Rome wasn't built in a day). Specializes in military field watches and dive watches using NH35/NH36 movements and features like BGW9 lume and C3-Superluminova.
South African watch brand with limited publicly available information. Unable to confirm current status or operational details from training data.

Revolver-inspired timepiece brand with active product development. Recent launches include SD-1 Sapphire Diver Series and AD5/AD6 models. Website hosted on scylo.com platform.

Microbrand watch company founded by Ramsingh focused on analog timepieces with history and heritage. Known for field watches, divers, and pilot watches at accessible price points. Company emphasizes quality, durability, and generational longevity.

Aviation-style watch brand that launched on Kickstarter around 2016. Featured surgical stainless steel casing, sapphire crystal, automatic Miyota movement, and 42-hour power reserve. No confirmed activity since September 2016.

Seestern is an automatic watch brand offering affordable mechanical timepieces. They source self-winding movements directly from manufacturers and sell through their own webstore and AliExpress. Country of origin unknown despite homepage content provided.

Seizenn Watches offers affordable vintage military-style watches with models like the W12 series and bronze case variants. Features mechanical movements and leather straps. Current active e-commerce presence with multiple product lines including MERKUR, Pierre Paulin, and Sugess.

Serket Watch Company is a boutique microbrand emphasizing quality, originality and attitude. Current collections include diver watches (Reef, Reef 2.0, Reef X), chronographs (Overdrive, Hex), and automatic watches (Revenant, Continuum). Prices in GBP range £265-£984 (approximately $335-$1,245 USD).

SHM Creations is a custom watch builder run by Sibito Morley offering one-of-a-kind hand-painted and lumed custom watches. The brand focuses on playful, colorful dial designs and custom watch building services with TWBC (Trusted Watch Builder) Certification.

Songdu is a budget watch brand offering affordable quartz timepieces. The D-9237M model features a 42mm stainless steel case with Japanese Miyota 2315 movement and is available in three color variants. Known for clean, geometric dial design and good packaging value at the $25 price point.

Pilot-focused watch brand specializing in aviation-inspired timepieces. Known for chronograph, GMT, and diver models including the T18, T21, T43, T47 Jumbo, and T48. Recently collaborated with Pacific Fighters on limited-edition watches featuring authentic aircraft materials.

TRAC Solutions manufactures electronic monitoring devices including the TRAC Watch, designed for correctional and monitoring agencies. The TRAC Watch features 90-day battery life, tamper detection, and real-time GPS tracking with minimal stigma design.

Ventus Watches produces vintage-inspired dive watches and field watches with Seiko NH35 automatic movements. Known for cushion case designs reminiscent of 1960s dive watches, offered in stainless steel and brass cases with Swiss Superluminova lume.

latestModel: Tree of Life Yggdrasil Wooden Watch
notes: Family-owned business founded in 2018 specializing in Viking-themed jewelry and wooden watches. Known for handcrafted personalized watches with sustainability focus (plants one tree per order). Offers free and fast shipping to the USA.

Visser Watches produces mechanical watches inspired by aerospace design and fly fishing heritage. The brand offers three main collections: Original Series, Tech Series, and Heritage Series. All current models shown as out of stock; website copyright dated 2018 with no recent activity indicators.

VPC Watch Co. positions watches as storytellers and time capsules built to last. Current offerings include the TYPE 37HW and TYPE 39VM dive watch. Products are limited-edition by design and archived after discontinuation.

W Laboratory is a watch brand with collections including Chronograph, Drift Series, Speed Series, GMT, WorldTimer, Ti Traveller Series, and Ecoventure Series. The brand operates an e-commerce site with USD pricing and ships internationally. No specific founding year, location, or pricing information is visible in the provided homepage content.

Adventure/hard use watch brand founded in 2019. Specializes in tool watches designed for extreme conditions with models like Explorer Collection, Field Watch Collection, and custom limited editions. Currently selling watches priced in GBP with multiple collections available.

Zircon Corporation was founded in 1975 as a manufacturer of digital watches. The company pivoted to electronic hand tools in 1980 and is now primarily known for StudSensor stud finders rather than watches. No current watch production information available.

ZIXEN creates precision mechanical timepieces inspired by 1960s-70s vintage style with clean, simple design. Branded as 'Made by a Diver for a Diver' with models including automatic, chronograph, and manual wind variants. Country of origin unknown; products sold through Touch of Modern marketplace.

Boutique watch brand established in 2014 focused on small quantities, attention to detail, and high quality at reasonable prices. Current collection includes five model lines: Bagheera GMT, Jota, Dino, Jarama, and Indy sport watches. Country of origin unknown.
